nodes.title: Use Auth0 for authentication
nodes.body: Chose Auth0 over rolling our own — need social login + MFA fast, and SOC2 later. Trade-off: vendor lock-in accepted.

nodes.title: TypeScript strict, no JS
nodes.body: All code TypeScript with strict mode. No implicit any. Terse answers preferred, no emojis in code.

nodes.title: lib/auth0.ts
nodes.body: Auth0Client wrapper + middleware. Session read via auth0.getSession().

nodes.title: Decide session expiry length
nodes.body: Open: 7-day rolling vs 30-day absolute. Security wants shorter; UX wants longer.

nodes.title: Postgres over Mongo for billing
nodes.body: Need relational joins across customers, subscriptions, invoices. Chose Postgres (Supabase). Mongo rejected.

nodes.title: Stripe for payments
nodes.body: Stripe Billing for subscriptions + metered usage. Webhooks drive our subscription state machine.

nodes.title: Stripe webhook returns 401 on retry
nodes.body: Webhook handler rejects Stripe retries with 401. Root cause: signature verified against raw body, but Next parses body first so the raw bytes differ. Retries then pile up.

nodes.title: app/api/webhook/route.ts
nodes.body: Stripe webhook receiver. Must read raw request body (not parsed JSON) before constructEvent.

nodes.title: Verify webhook signature on raw body
nodes.body: Fix: disable body parsing for the route, pass raw bytes to stripe.webhooks.constructEvent with STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET. Add retry idempotency key.

nodes.title: Idempotency keys on write endpoints
nodes.body: All payment-mutating endpoints require an idempotency key to survive Stripe retries and double-clicks.

nodes.title: Deploy on Vercel
nodes.body: Next.js app deploys to Vercel. Preview deploys per PR. Serverless functions for API routes.

nodes.title: Staging build fails: missing env var
nodes.body: Build breaks on staging — STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET not set in Vercel staging env. Works locally via .env.local.

nodes.title: vercel.json
nodes.body: Region pinned to iad1 (near Supabase). Function maxDuration bumped to 30s for webhook processing.

nodes.title: Sync env vars across Vercel environments
nodes.body: Open: script to diff/push env vars between local, staging, prod so builds stop breaking.

nodes.title: Use pgvector for product search
nodes.body: Add pgvector to the existing Postgres for semantic product search instead of a separate vector DB. One less service.

nodes.title: Embed product descriptions nightly
nodes.body: Open: cron to embed new/changed product descriptions with text-embedding-3-small and upsert vectors.

nodes.title: lib/search.ts
nodes.body: matchProducts(query): embed query, ivfflat cosine search, return top 20. Mirrors billing DB choice (Postgres).

nodes.title: No reranker for v1
nodes.body: Ship raw vector similarity first. Revisit a reranker only if relevance complaints appear. YAGNI.
